title: Chinese Dark Chess
text: Home * Games * Chinese Dark Chess Chinese Dark Chess (暗棋), a popular version of Banqi , a variation of Chinese Chess that only uses half of the board, also called dark chess , half chess or blind chess . Chinese dark chess is a two-player zero-sum and incomplete information board game .
